name: Insulin and IGF Axis Modulation Surveillance

scope.question: What changed for Insulin and IGF Axis Modulation since the June 3, 2026 publication, and does any change justify a public update?

summary: Same-day PubMed surveillance after the insulin/IGF baseline publication found no material public-update delta. The only post-publication PubMed hit close enough to review was adjacent cardiometabolic tirzepatide biomarker context rather than an insulin/GH/IGF aging intervention. Narrow ClinicalTrials.gov checks surfaced pre-window acarbose and FMD/longevity-diet registry records that were not staged in the public insulin/IGF evidence map; these are historical source-completeness gaps, not same-day evidence changes. A coverage assessment was added and recommends coverage repair before another ordinary surveillance pass.

materiality_decision.rationale: No checked post-publication source changes the current human_biomarker_signal stage, steady momentum, low confidence, blockers, or best-current-signal language. The useful finding is that older acarbose aging and FMD/longevity-diet registry records should be handled as coverage repair rather than ordinary surveillance.

search_log.query: ((insulin-like growth factor OR IGF-1 OR IGF1R OR growth hormone receptor OR insulin signaling OR acarbose OR fasting mimicking diet) AND (aging OR longevity OR lifespan OR frailty OR older adults)) AND 2026/06/03[Date - Publication]
((insulin-like growth factor OR IGF-1 OR IGF1R OR growth hormone receptor) AND (human OR trial OR older OR aging)) AND 2026/06/03[Date - Publication]
search_log.summary: Returned PMID 42233927, PMID 42233597, and PMID 42230695; none warranted public insulin/IGF-axis aging updates.

search_log.query: Aging condition with acarbose intervention; aging condition with fasting mimicking diet intervention; broader aging/frailty/longevity terms with GH/IGF/acarbose/FMD interventions.
search_log.summary: Identified pre-window acarbose aging registry records with posted results and FMD/longevity-diet registry records without posted results. These should be reviewed in coverage repair.

excluded_sources.title: Comprehensive Long-Term Changes in Cardiovascular Risk Biomarkers With Tirzepatide: A SURMOUNT-1 Post Hoc Analysis
excluded_sources.reason: Same-day post hoc obesity trial biomarker analysis with HOMA-IR and cardiometabolic markers. It is adjacent metabolic context, not intentional insulin/GH/IGF-axis aging modulation and not enough to alter the current outlook.

excluded_sources.title: The Framework of Precision Pharmacotherapy in Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatohepatitis: A Network Meta-Analysis
excluded_sources.reason: MASH pharmacotherapy meta-analysis, not an insulin/GH/IGF-axis aging intervention or longevity-relevant endpoint update.

excluded_sources.title: Silymarin conserves the efficacy of quinolone and sulfonamide in Nile tilapia subjected to aflatoxicosis and Streptococcus agalactiae infection
excluded_sources.reason: Fish toxicology and infection model, not relevant to the track's aging evidence map.

excluded_sources.title: Study of Acarbose in Longevity
excluded_sources.reason: Pre-window terminated acarbose aging registry with posted results and n = 28. It may be a coverage-repair source, but it is not a post-publication surveillance delta.

excluded_sources.title: Acarbose Anti-aging Effects in Geriatric Subjects (Substudy B & C)
excluded_sources.reason: Pre-window completed n = 8 acarbose registry with posted microbiome results. It should be handled during coverage repair if used, not as a same-day public update.

excluded_sources.title: Follow up Study of Varapodio Trial: Effect of Longevity and Fasting Mimicking Diet on Risk Factors Age Correlated and Biomarkers of Aging
excluded_sources.reason: Recruiting FMD follow-up registry last updated before this surveillance pass and without posted results.

excluded_sources.title: Longevity Diet and the Fasting-mimicking Diet
excluded_sources.reason: Completed FMD/longevity-diet registry without posted results as of this pass; potentially useful trial-watch context for coverage repair.

notes: The delta window was extremely short because the baseline was published earlier on June 3, 2026.
The tirzepatide SURMOUNT-1 biomarker analysis is relevant to adjacent metabolic-risk tracks but does not test aging-directed insulin/GH/IGF-axis attenuation.

The acarbose human registry records are older than the baseline and should be reviewed as source-completeness repair, especially because the public outlook currently uses acarbose as animal lifespan support.
FMD/longevity-diet registry records could improve activity and trial-watch coverage, but no checked registry supplied posted aging biomarker, functional, disease, or mortality results.
next_actions: Run coverage repair for insulin/IGF axis modulation before ordinary surveillance.
During repair, decide whether NCT02953093, NCT02865499, NCT07255300, NCT07065955, and NCT05698654 should become public trial-watch, limiting, or excluded-context records.
Do not create a surveillance bundle from this pass because no post-publication source warrants a public outlook update.
